title: Consolidate duplicate ReadOriginFact implementations
description:
## Evidence
Two separate `ReadOriginFact` implementations exist:
1. `BuildGoalDecomposer.ReadOriginFact()` — logs a warning when the fact is unparseable
2. `HtnPlanner.ReadOriginFact()` — silently returns 0 for unparseable values

## Impact
Inconsistent behavior. The HtnPlanner path silently swallows bad data while the BuildGoalDecomposer path logs it.

## Fix
1. Extract a shared `BuildFactKeys.ReadOriginFact()` utility method
2. Add logging to both call sites
3. Handle all value types consistently (int, long, string)

## Verification
Overlooked by all audits. See `Data/Pages/audits/msa-audit-verification-6-23.md` section O1.
